companyNameJapanese: キオクシアホールディングス株式会社
description: Global leader in NAND flash memory and SSDs. Third-largest NAND supplier globally with 14% market share. Products include BiCS FLASH, UFS, e-MMC for consumer/industrial/automotive, and XL-FLASH storage class memory.

_externalRelationships.notes: 3rd largest NAND supplier (14% share). Apple agreed to 2x price increase for 2026 Q1. JV with Western Digital for manufacturing.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, Bloomberg, Perplexity Finance, Nikkei
_metadata.notes: IPO: Dec 18, 2024. Formerly Toshiba Memory. All-time high: 21,610 JPY (Jan 30, 2026). 51% revenue from SSD NAND. 9 analysts rate Buy, target: 26,525 JPY.
